The '''Royal Intelligence Service''' was the primary intelligence agency of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].

==History==
At some point, the Hapan Intelligence Security was tasked with identifying the [[Lalu Morwan|Lady Morwan]] as well as her superiors.<ref name="temp" />

[[Trista Zel|Trista]] and [[Taryn Zel]] worked for [[Hapan]] Intelligence at some point. By [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it was considered to be one of the finest intelligence services in the galaxy.<ref name="temp">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>
